summary: The SwingRatings algorithm indicates that DDOG is currently testing its Daily 50MA support zone near $238.67. Based on historical price action, bounces from this level have yielded a win rate of 66.7%. This is a fresh test of the support, suggesting that optimal buy-side liquidity remains intact. In the event of a successful bounce, traders should monitor overhead supply, particularly a primary horizontal resistance at $277.70. This setup presents a structured risk-reward profile for swing positioning.
